title: cyperus pratensis
intro: Cyperus pratensis, also known as umbrella sedge, is a type of perennial aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is known to provide health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Cyperus pratensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
